title: London Thames Tidal Visualization
author: makestuff
description: Interactive visualization showing the tidal Thames river with flooding and ebbing tides represented by animated balls. Shows how the narrow London river can rise/fall by 7m during tidal cycles.

title: London Weather Data Analysis
author: AydinHassanpour
description: Python project analyzing and visualizing London weather data using Open-Meteo API with interactive charts via Matplotlib and Seaborn for temperature, precipitation trends.

title: TfL Transport Network Visualization
author: Osakwe1
description: Interactive 3D models and data visualization examining Transport for London travel patterns from 2007-2021, showing busiest stations and network evolution.

title: London Underground Live Map
author: Ben James
description: Real-time London Underground train positions displayed on an interactive map showing live tube movements across the network using TfL API data.

title: Weather Data + Art Yarn Visualizer
author: Community Project
description: Get historical weather data and visualize crochet/knitting projects by choosing yarn colors based on temperature patterns - blending weather data with fiber arts.

title: Animated London Tube Pathfinding
author: ZeevoX
description: Visual explanation of pathfinding algorithms (BFS, DFS, Dijkstra, A*) using the London Underground map with animated station traversal.

title: London React Weather App
author: Frnt-End
description: React weather app showing current conditions in Berlin, Paris, New York & London with tab switching, axios API fetch, and dynamic backgrounds.

title: London Underground Data Viz
author: ruaridhw
description: Comprehensive Transport for London timetable analysis with spatiotemporal animations showing train movements and journey planning algorithms across the network.

title: Digital Art Week London 2025
author: Digital Art Week
description: Citywide digital art festival across London's iconic locations featuring 120+ artists, AR experiences at landmarks like Tower Bridge, and immersive installations.

title: Outernet London Immersive Art
author: Outernet Global
description: Interactive entertainment district near Tottenham Court Road with 360° LED environment showing rotating digital art installations responding to movement.

title: London Food App Recipe API
author: LondonAppDeveloper
description: Django REST API for recipe management with Django and Docker, created by London-based developer for food app backend infrastructure.

title: Weather Landscape Generator
author: Community
description: Trending GitHub project generating artistic landscapes from real-time weather data using NumPy/Pillow, mapping temperature to terrain height and wind to patterns.
